title: [3.13] gh-126876: Fix socket internal_select() for large timeout (GH-126968)
author: miss-islington
body:
If the timeout is larger than INT_MAX, replace it with INT_MAX, in
the poll() code path.

Add an unit test.
(cherry picked from commit b3687ad454c4ac54c8599a10f3ace8a13ca48915)

Co-authored-by: Victor Stinner <vstinner@python.org>

<!-- gh-issue-number: gh-126876 -->
* Issue: gh-126876
<!-- /gh-issue-number -->

comments.author: vstinner
comments.body: I included my second test_socket fix https://github.com/python/cpython/pull/127517 in this backport.
